name: Irish Beef Stew with Guinness
recipeIngredient: Beef Stew Meat - 2 pounds, cut into 2-inch cubes
Yellow Onion - 1 large, cut into 1/4 inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a 6-quart stove-top casserole and add the oil and bay leaves. Cook the bay leaves for a moment, then add the meat. Brown the meat on both sides over high heat (flour the meat first if desired). Add the sliced onion and cook until translucent.
2. Reduce the heat to low and add the garlic, thyme, rosemary, and flour; stir until smooth. Add the beef stock and Guinness stout. Simmer, stirring occasionally, until the stew thickens slightly.
3. Add the remaining ingredients (carrots and potatoes) and cover. Place the pot in a 275-degree oven for about 2 hours, stirring a couple of times.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
